# Cosmic Horizon of Hope
## Scripture
"For I know the plans I have for you,” declares the Lord, “plans to prosper you and not to harm you, plans to give you hope and a future." - Jeremiah 29:11

## Reflection
As we gaze out into the vast expanse of the night sky, we are reminded of the infinite possibilities that lie before us. The Milky Way, a celestial wonder, stretches out like a canvas of promise, inviting us to explore and discover the mysteries of God's creation. Just as the stars and galaxies are constantly evolving, our lives are also part of a dynamic and ever-unfolding plan. God's sovereignty over all creation is a comforting reminder that our lives are not without purpose or direction. In the midst of uncertainty, we can trust that God's plans for us are rooted in love and hope.

## Prayer
Dear Heavenly Father, as we look out into the cosmic horizon, may we be filled with hope and anticipation for the future. Help us to trust in your sovereign plan, knowing that you have our best interests at heart. May we be encouraged by the vastness and beauty of your creation, and may our hearts be filled with confidence in your loving care. Guide us as we navigate the journey of life, and may we shine like stars in the darkness, reflecting your light and love to a world in need. Amen.
